title: Knowing the Professors
agentSubtitle: Find BIT professors by research topic, department, or name.
welcome: Hi, I am the BIT Professor Agent. I search a local corpus with 22 departments and 753 professor profiles. Tell me a research topic, department, or professor name, and I can surface suitable professors and profile details from the corpus.
responsePlaceholder: The agent's markdown response will appear here after the student starts.
activityEmpty: No activity yet. After a prompt is submitted, this section can show safe high-level steps the agent used.
composerPlaceholder: Ask about a topic or a BIT professor...
quickResearchPrompt: Which BIT professors across departments work on machine learning and artificial intelligence?
quickExplainPrompt: Tell me about Li Xin's research profile in Computer Science and Technology.
